title: Han, Hun, Dirch og Dario
actors: Ghita Nørby, Ebbe Langberg, Dirch Passer
plot: Poul Borg neglects his young, beautiful wife Marianne. He even forget their wedding day, in favor of a new fast sports car, a beautiful silver-gray Jaguar. During his drive, he runs out of gas. A young lady Laura Lublinski helps him.
